 037: def sha256_blocks(int n):
 038:     """Compute SHA-256 over n deterministic bytes (i % 251).
 039: 
 040:     Returns:
 041:         Tuple of (h0, h3, h7).
 042:     """
+043:     cdef int padded_len = ((n + 72) // 64) * 64  # = ceil((n+9)/64)*64
  __pyx_v_padded_len = (((__pyx_v_n + 72) / 64) * 64);

+044:     cdef unsigned char *msg = <unsigned char *>malloc(padded_len)
  __pyx_v_msg = ((unsigned char *)malloc(__pyx_v_padded_len));

+045:     if msg == NULL:
  __pyx_t_1 = (__pyx_v_msg == NULL);
  if (unlikely(__pyx_t_1)) {
/* … */
  }

+046:         raise MemoryError()
    PyErr_NoMemory(); __PYX_ERR(0, 46, __pyx_L1_error)

 047: 
 048:     # Fill data + padding
 049:     cdef int i, j, blk
+050:     for i in range(n):
  __pyx_t_2 = __pyx_v_n;
  __pyx_t_3 = __pyx_t_2;
  for (__pyx_t_4 = 0; __pyx_t_4 < __pyx_t_3; __pyx_t_4+=1) {
    __pyx_v_i = __pyx_t_4;

+051:         msg[i] = i % 251
    (__pyx_v_msg[__pyx_v_i]) = (__pyx_v_i % 0xFB);
  }

+052:     msg[n] = 0x80
  (__pyx_v_msg[__pyx_v_n]) = 0x80;

+053:     for i in range(n + 1, padded_len - 8):
  __pyx_t_5 = (__pyx_v_padded_len - 8);
  __pyx_t_6 = __pyx_t_5;
  for (__pyx_t_2 = (__pyx_v_n + 1); __pyx_t_2 < __pyx_t_6; __pyx_t_2+=1) {
    __pyx_v_i = __pyx_t_2;

+054:         msg[i] = 0
    (__pyx_v_msg[__pyx_v_i]) = 0;
  }

 055:     # Big-endian bit length
+056:     cdef unsigned long long bit_len = <unsigned long long>n * 8
  __pyx_v_bit_len = (((unsigned PY_LONG_LONG)__pyx_v_n) * 8);

+057:     msg[padded_len - 8] = <unsigned char>(bit_len >> 56)
  (__pyx_v_msg[(__pyx_v_padded_len - 8)]) = ((unsigned char)(__pyx_v_bit_len >> 56));

+058:     msg[padded_len - 7] = <unsigned char>((bit_len >> 48) & 0xFF)
  (__pyx_v_msg[(__pyx_v_padded_len - 7)]) = ((unsigned char)((__pyx_v_bit_len >> 48) & 0xFF));

+059:     msg[padded_len - 6] = <unsigned char>((bit_len >> 40) & 0xFF)
  (__pyx_v_msg[(__pyx_v_padded_len - 6)]) = ((unsigned char)((__pyx_v_bit_len >> 40) & 0xFF));

+060:     msg[padded_len - 5] = <unsigned char>((bit_len >> 32) & 0xFF)
  (__pyx_v_msg[(__pyx_v_padded_len - 5)]) = ((unsigned char)((__pyx_v_bit_len >> 32) & 0xFF));
